# 109g.org

> Free guide to the 180-day filing bar under 11 U.S.C. Section 109(g).

109g.org is a free, open-source educational resource about the 180-day bankruptcy filing bar. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://109g.org/: Complete guide to the 180-day filing bar, eligibility rules, and when you can refile

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
